$schema: Design system for docproc — minimalist, document-centric workspace system

meta.purpose: Single source of truth for visual language, motion, navigation structure, and UX behavior across the docproc knowledge workspace.
meta.aesthetic: Minimalist academic workspace. Calm, refined, document-first. Subtle depth, restrained color, fluid transitions. Feels like a thinking notebook.

designPrinciples.documentCentric: Documents are the core object. UI should reinforce reading, editing, and referencing.
designPrinciples.calmIntelligence: No visual noise. Hierarchy through spacing and typography, not decoration.
designPrinciples.progressiveDisclosure: Reveal complexity only when needed. Panels slide, menus fade, controls appear on hover.
designPrinciples.fluidContinuity: Navigation should feel like moving across a continuous surface, not switching pages.
designPrinciples.contextualAI: AI tools appear in context, not as loud global elements.
designPrinciples.longFormFriendly: Optimized for reading paragraphs, writing notes, and answering questions.

alignmentRules.contentCentering: Main column centered via margin-inline auto

spacingScale.unit: 4px base grid (converted to rem in implementation)

typography.fontFamily: Inter, SF Pro, or Plus Jakarta Sans
rules: Use size and weight for hierarchy, never color alone.
Reserve xl+ only for page titles and key metrics.
Body copy should remain at base for readability.

colorSystem.accentStrategy: Single primary accent for actions and links. Semantic colors only for status.

rules: Motion should never distract from reading.

secondaryNavigation.activeIndicator: 2px accent bottom border with animated transition

primary.color: white or dark text depending on theme

chatBlocks.assistant: Subtle left accent border + surfaceMuted background

uxPatterns.processingDocuments: Subtle animated shimmer or status dot.
uxPatterns.autoSaveIndicator: Small dot that fades in/out near title.
uxPatterns.errorFeedback: Inline message below component; avoid modal unless critical.

accessibility.keyboardNavigation: All tabs and panels reachable via keyboard.
accessibility.ariaRoles: Use for navigation, panels, and dialogs.

usageNotesForAI: Always use tokens, never raw hex.
Prefer spacing and typography over borders.
Keep UI density moderate; avoid overcrowding the main column.
In dark mode, create depth through background contrast, not shadow.
